Organization, agent, name, prompt, and project preference for the new task. The /agents/tasks/create API accepts requests in the following format:

CreateAgentTaskRequest Model - Request body for creating an agent task.
organizationId string
required
Identifier of the organization that will own the task.
agentId integer
required
example: 47
Identifier of the agent the task should use.
name string
required
Name of the task. The platform may rewrite this to a normalized form on create.
prompt string
required
Prompt the agent will execute when the task is deployed.
projectPreference string Enum
required
How projects should be mapped to deployments of this task. Options : ['project-each-task-deployment', 'project-for-task']
Example 
{
  "organizationId": "string",
  "agentId": 47,
  "name": "string",
  "prompt": "string",
  "projectPreference": "project-each-task-deployment"
}
